creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I have seen this port lag behind, you could of updated it with the 
3.4.2rc's or 3.4.0 etc.. You can also use SVN to check out the current 
4.0, it is a -devel port. 3.2.6 is dated back to 2006.

I myself don't see the need for this port if it wont be updated. I am 
willing to work will you if you need help getting the port to work using 
SVN.

if you care to discuss this over email i'm all ears :)

c.petrik.sosa at gmail.com
